meaning: n.吸收性,吸光度;n.吸收性,吸收能力,[物][化]吸光率(度)
examples: Coverage will vary with absorbency of timber and profile of deck.
If it gets saturated in less than 4 hours, try a heavier absorbency tampon.
Reduces the water - absorbency of the outer fabric, optimizing breathability.
The Swedish insurance company Folksam found it performed at least three times better than 12 conventional helmets in a test for shock absorbency.
Chromatography is a process used by scientists to separate complex chemical mixtures at the "nano, " or molecular, level by virtue of differences in absorbency.
